text: Operated the lexintel analysis pipeline for the HOTEL workspace. First reset its run status: because a completed run (including memo.md) was present, snapshotted all 41 files to pipeline/workspaces/HOTEL/archive/20260704-154049-pre-reset-snapshot before running --reset, returning all 39 steps to "not run" (only A1 ready). Noted that --status flags A20 (gate) as non-current. Then ran steps A1 through A5 in the background (task bb0ddwghf), which completed cleanly in about 3 minutes, producing fresh case_data, legal_frame, hypothesis, pattern, and market outputs. Completion unblocked the next tier (A6 concentration, A7 prior, A8 evidence, A9 defendants, A10 enforcement, A11 precedents), with the session ending ready to run those steps.
